message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ユーザ" as user
boundary "ブラウザ" as browser
boundary "web.php" as webphp
boundary "PersonController" as personcontroller
boundary "Person" as person
boundary "person.find.blade" as blade

user -> browser : 該当ページをリクエスト [person/find]
browser -> webphp : GET[person/find]
webphp -> personcontroller : @find
personcontroller -> blade : 
user -> blade : findボタン押下
blade -> webphp : POST
webphp -> personcontroller : @search
personcontroller -> person : find()
person --> personcontroller : 
personcontroller -> blade : 
blade -> person : getData()
person --> blade : 

note right of person
  Person
end note

note right of blade
  person.find.blade
end note

note right of personcontroller
  PersonController
end note

note right of webphp
  web.php
end note

note right of browser
  ブラウザ
end note

note right of user
  ユーザ
end note

@enduml
